overview: DNR College of Engineering and Technology (DNRCET), established in 2010, is a prominent private autonomous institution located in the DNR College campus in Bhimavaram. It is part of the legendary DNR (Dantuluri Narayana Raju) group of institutions, which has a century-long legacy in education. The college is recognized for its strong academic discipline and for providing technical education in the West Godavari region.
accreditation: UGC Autonomous status. Accredited by NAAC with an 'A++' Grade and NBA (for specific departments). Approved by AICTE, New Delhi, and affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada (JNTUK).

coursesAndFees.course: B.Tech (CSE, AI&ML, AI&DS, ECE, EEE, Civil, Mechanical)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: 10+2 with 45% aggregate in PCM + AP EAPCET rank

coursesAndFees.course: M.Tech (CSE, Machine Design, Structural Engineering, DECS)
coursesAndFees.eligibility: B.E./B.Tech with 50% aggregate + GATE / AP PGECET score
Graduation with 50% aggregate + AP ICET rank

admissions.admissionProcess: Admissions are conducted through state-level web counseling (APSCHE). 70% of seats are filled under the Convener Quota (Category A) based on entrance exam ranks. 30% are Management Quota (Category B) seats filled based on merit or qualifying scores. Lateral entry for diploma holders is through AP ECET.
admissions.importantDates: AP EAPCET 2026: May 12–15 & 18, 2026; AP ICET 2026: July 2026; AP PGECET 2026 Results: May 14, 2026.

campus.area: Integrated within a large multi-institutional campus
facilities: Spacious Central Library with Digital Section
Separate On-campus Hostels for Boys and Girls
Transportation (Dedicated bus services for Bhimavaram and surrounding towns)
campus.specialNote: DNRCET is situated within the historic 60+ acre DNR College campus, providing students with access to a massive ecosystem including post-graduate centers and traditional arts/science colleges. The institute offers various merit-based scholarships for the top 10-20% of students in each branch.

contact.address: DNR College Campus, Balusumudi, Bhimavaram, West Godavari District, Andhra Pradesh - 534202
